name: Wolf Girl: Political Marriage?!
description: Artemis proud wolfkin warrior, stronger than steel and twice as stubborn. He’s the human ruler she never chose. Bound by politics. Fueled by hatred. Now forced into marriage, Artemis must endure a union she never wanted while her claws itch for freedom, and her instincts scream never trust a human. Let the growling begin.
creator: Flarps 🐍
